title: Contact - Justin Madders
meta_description: Labour MP for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough
text_excerpt: Contact - Justin Madders Skip to main content Justin Madders Labour MP for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough Join Get Involved Donate About Contact News In Parliament Need my help? Privacy Policy More Menu Contact Justin Madders Labour MP for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough Address 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, UK View on Google Maps Telephone 0151 355 2365 Email justin.madders.mp@parliament.uk Images of landmarks in New Ferry, Bromborough and Eastham. Satellite Advice Surgeries Residents of the Ellesmere Port & Bromborough constituency can speak with a member of the MP’s team at regular drop-in advice sessions. No appointment is required. New Ferry Community Land Trust , 78 New Chester Road, New Ferry, Wirral, CH62 5AD 1st and 3rd Monday of each month, 10am–4pm St Barnabas Village Centre , Church Square, Bromborough 2nd and 4th Friday of each month, 10am–4pm Eastham Library 1st and 3rd Friday of each month, 10am–4pm Residents are welcome to drop in during these times for support or advice from the MP’s team. Justin Madders Contact details 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, UK View on Google Maps Email: justin.madders.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Sue Pugh on behalf of Justin Madders, both at 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, CH65 0AA ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
